summary: Free subscriber Peacock archive - Feed Select modal
description: GIVEN a user is a Free subscriber

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive Peacock game tile
steps.result:
THEN the user will see the Peacock feed button with a lock icon
AND a message does not display letting the user know where the game can be watched
AND the user cannot playback the Peacock feed
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions page after selecting the feed button
